title: Ramp Router
excerpt: Ramp Router sends every AI request to the lowest-cost approved model that clears your quality bar. One endpoint, automatic routing, less spend.
content_html:
Ramp Router

The right model forevery request.

Frequently asked questions

Straight answers about how Ramp Router works, who it’s for, and how to get started.

What is an LLM router?

An LLM router is one API endpoint for accessing multiple AI models. Instead of wiring your app to one provider at a time, you send requests through our router which can choose the right model for the job based on quality, cost, and availability.

How does it work?

Your request goes to Ramp Router first. We’ll authenticate the request and help you track the usage, model, provider, and cost. We’ll automatically route eligible requests to a more cost-efficient tier when it won't affect quality.

Why is Ramp building an LLM router?

Saving you time and money is the whole reason Ramp exists. AI tokens are the fastest-growing spend category, and we want every token you use to be worth it.

What models do you support?

Ramp Router supports the latest models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini plus select open-source models, including Kimi. We regularly add support for new models as they become available.

How much does it cost?

Ramp Router is free to use at launch. You’ll pay list price for the tokens you use. As a thank you to our early access users, the first 500 people invited will receive $100 in promotional credits to get started. Subject to offer terms.

Do I need to be a Ramp customer?

No. You don’t need a Ramp card, a company account, or even an LLC. We’re inviting an initial group of users to get early access. Join the waitlist to request your spot.

What's the difference between using Ramp Router and going direct with a provider?

Going direct usually means choosing one provider, one model catalog, and one pricing structure yourself. Ramp Router gives you one endpoint across eligible models and can route requests to the lowest-cost option that meets the quality bar. As new models launch, change prices, and performance change, Ramp Router will adapt automatically without requiring you to constantly rework your integration.

Do I have to rewrite my code to use this?

No. Ramp Router has an OpenAI-compatible API, so if you’re already using the OpenAI SDK or another OpenAI-compatible framework (which is basically all of them!), switching should be a one-line change: update your base URL to Ramp Router’s endpoint.

Who should use this?

Router is for anyone who wants to get more from AI without overpaying for it. It helps you get the same work done for less, whether you’re testing an idea on your own, building for a team, or managing AI across an enterprise. We’re inviting an initial group now. Request an invite.

What happens if a provider has an outage or rate-limits me?

If a provider goes down or rate-limits you, Ramp Router can route eligible requests to another available model, so your app has a fallback when one provider cannot serve it.

How does Ramp Router handle my data and credentials?

Please see the Ramp Router Privacy Policy for information on how Ramp manages personal information.

Tokens are money. Save both.

Model providers make more when you use more frontier intelligence. Ramp wins when you spend less.

Save both.Model providers make more when you use more frontier intelligence. Ramp wins when you spend less.

blocks.html_en:
Router chooses the right model for the job,
then applies 100+ optimizations to get it done for less.

sentences.en: Router chooses the right model for the job, then applies 100+ optimizations to get it done for less.
sentences.zh: Router 会为工作选择正确的模型，然后应用 100 多项优化，以更少的成本完成工作。

blocks.html_en: Pay for what the job needs. Nothing more.

sentences.en: Pay for what the job needs.

blocks.html_en: Every week, the price-intelligence-latency frontier shifts. Router tests each new model on real work, then automatically sends every request to the lowest-cost model that clears its quality bar.

sentences.en: Every week, the price-intelligence-latency frontier shifts.
sentences.zh: 价格-情报-延迟边界每周都会发生变化。

sentences.en: Router tests each new model on real work, then automatically sends every request to the lowest-cost model that clears its quality bar.
sentences.zh: 路由器在实际工作中测试每个新模型，然后自动将每个请求发送到清除其质量标准的最低成本模型。

blocks.html_en: Implement in a few lines of code

sentences.en: Implement in a few lines of code
sentences.zh: 只需几行代码即可实现

blocks.html_en: One endpoint gives you leading closed and open models. Router handles routing, fallbacks, and provider updates so you benefit from new models without rewriting your application.

sentences.en: One endpoint gives you leading closed and open models.
sentences.zh: 一个端点为您提供领先的封闭式和开放式模型。

sentences.en: Router handles routing, fallbacks, and provider updates so you benefit from new models without rewriting your application.
sentences.zh: 路由器处理路由、回退和提供程序更新，因此您可以从新模型中受益，而无需重写应用程序。

blocks.html_en: “At Ramp, Router cut our LLM costs by 30% while making our features smarter and faster.”

sentences.en: “At Ramp, Router cut our LLM costs by 30% while making our features smarter and faster.”
sentences.zh: “在 Ramp，Router 将我们的 LLM 成本降低了 30%，同时使我们的功能更加智能、更快。”

blocks.html_en: Router handles caching, compaction, semantic attribution and 100+ optimizations on every request to make it faster and cheaper.

sentences.en: Router handles caching, compaction, semantic attribution and 100+ optimizations on every request to make it faster and cheaper.
sentences.zh: Router 对每个请求进行缓存、压缩、语义归因和 100 多项优化，使其更快、更便宜。
看看谁在哪里花了什么。

blocks.html_en: Attribute every request by model, product, team, and project with Ramp Token Spend Management.

sentences.en: Attribute every request by model, product, team, and project with Ramp Token Spend Management.
sentences.zh: 使用 Ramp 令牌支出管理按模型、产品、团队和项目对每个请求进行归因。

sentences.en: Total spend over time30 days · USD
sentences.zh: 30 天期间的总支出 · 美元

blocks.html_en: Straight answers about how Ramp Router works, who it’s for, and how to get started.

sentences.en: Straight answers about how Ramp Router works, who it’s for, and how to get started.
sentences.zh: 关于 Ramp Router 的工作原理、适用人群以及如何开始使用的直接答案。
什么是 LLM 路由器？

blocks.html_en: An LLM router is one API endpoint for accessing multiple AI models. Instead of wiring your app to one provider at a time, you send requests through our router which can choose the right model for the job based on quality, cost, and availability.

sentences.en: An LLM router is one API endpoint for accessing multiple AI models.
sentences.zh: LLM 路由器是用于访问多个 AI 模型的 API 端点。

sentences.en: Instead of wiring your app to one provider at a time, you send requests through our router which can choose the right model for the job based on quality, cost, and availability.
sentences.zh: 您无需一次将您的应用程序连接到一个提供商，而是通过我们的路由器发送请求，路由器可以根据质量、成本和可用性为工作选择正确的模型。

blocks.html_en: Your request goes to Ramp Router first. We’ll authenticate the request and help you track the usage, model, provider, and cost. We’ll automatically route eligible requests to a more cost-efficient tier when it won't affect quality.

sentences.en: Your request goes to Ramp Router first.
sentences.zh: 您的请求首先发送至 Ramp Router。

sentences.en: We’ll authenticate the request and help you track the usage, model, provider, and cost.
sentences.zh: 我们将验证请求并帮助您跟踪使用情况、型号、提供商和成本。

sentences.en: We’ll automatically route eligible requests to a more cost-efficient tier when it won't affect quality.
sentences.zh: 在不影响质量的情况下，我们会自动将符合条件的请求路由到更具成本效益的层。

blocks.html_en: Why is Ramp building an LLM router?

sentences.en: Why is Ramp building an LLM router?
sentences.zh: Ramp 为什么要构建 LLM 路由器？

blocks.html_en: Saving you time and money is the whole reason Ramp exists. AI tokens are the fastest-growing spend category, and we want every token you use to be worth it.

sentences.en: Saving you time and money is the whole reason Ramp exists.
sentences.zh: 节省您的时间和金钱是 Ramp 存在的全部原因。

sentences.en: AI tokens are the fastest-growing spend category, and we want every token you use to be worth it.
sentences.zh: AI 代币是增长最快的支出类别，我们希望您使用的每一个代币都物有所值。

blocks.html_en: Ramp Router supports the latest models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini plus select open-source models, including Kimi. We regularly add support for new models as they become available.

sentences.en: Ramp Router supports the latest models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini plus select open-source models, including Kimi.
sentences.zh: Ramp Router 支持 OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Gemini 的最新模型以及精选的开源模型，包括 Kimi。

sentences.en: We regularly add support for new models as they become available.
sentences.zh: 当新模型可用时，我们会定期添加对新模型的支持。

blocks.html_en: Ramp Router is free to use at launch. You’ll pay list price for the tokens you use. As a thank you to our early access users, the first 500 people invited will receive $100 in promotional credits to get started. Subject to offer terms.

sentences.en: Ramp Router is free to use at launch.
sentences.zh: Ramp Router 在发布时可免费使用。

sentences.en: You’ll pay list price for the tokens you use.
sentences.zh: 您将为您使用的代币支付标价。

sentences.en: As a thank you to our early access users, the first 500 people invited will receive $100 in promotional credits to get started.
sentences.zh: 为了感谢我们的抢先体验用户，前 500 名受邀者将获得 100 美元的促销积分以开始使用。

blocks.html_en: Do I need to be a Ramp customer?

sentences.en: Do I need to be a Ramp customer?
sentences.zh: 我需要成为 Ramp 客户吗？

blocks.html_en: No. You don’t need a Ramp card, a company account, or even an LLC. We’re inviting an initial group of users to get early access. Join the waitlist to request your spot.

sentences.en: No. You don’t need a Ramp card, a company account, or even an LLC.
sentences.zh: 不需要。您不需要 Ramp 卡、公司帐户，甚至是 LLC。

sentences.en: We’re inviting an initial group of users to get early access.
sentences.zh: 我们正在邀请第一批用户抢先体验。

sentences.en: Join the waitlist to request your spot.
sentences.zh: 加入候补名单以申请席位。

blocks.html_en: What's the difference between using Ramp Router and going direct with a provider?

sentences.en: What's the difference between using Ramp Router and going direct with a provider?
sentences.zh: 使用 Ramp Router 和直接与提供商联系有什么区别？

blocks.html_en: Going direct usually means choosing one provider, one model catalog, and one pricing structure yourself. Ramp Router gives you one endpoint across eligible models and can route requests to the lowest-cost option that meets the quality bar. As new models launch, change prices, and performance change, Ramp Router will adapt automatically without requiring you to constantly rework your integration.

sentences.en: Going direct usually means choosing one provider, one model catalog, and one pricing structure yourself.
sentences.zh: 直接选择通常意味着您自己选择一个供应商、一种型号目录和一种定价结构。

sentences.en: Ramp Router gives you one endpoint across eligible models and can route requests to the lowest-cost option that meets the quality bar.
sentences.zh: Ramp Router 为您提供跨合格型号的一个端点，并且可以将请求路由到满足质量标准的最低成本选项。

sentences.en: As new models launch, change prices, and performance change, Ramp Router will adapt automatically without requiring you to constantly rework your integration.
sentences.zh: 随着新型号的推出、价格的变化和性能的变化，Ramp Router 将自动适应，无需您不断地重新进行集成。

blocks.html_en: Do I have to rewrite my code to use this?

sentences.en: Do I have to rewrite my code to use this?
sentences.zh: 我需要重写我的代码才能使用它吗？

blocks.html_en: No. Ramp Router has an OpenAI-compatible API, so if you’re already using the OpenAI SDK or another OpenAI-compatible framework (which is basically all of them!), switching should be a one-line change: update your base URL to Ramp Router’s endpoint.

sentences.en: No. Ramp Router has an OpenAI-compatible API, so if you’re already using the OpenAI SDK or another OpenAI-compatible framework (which is basically all of them!), switching should be a one-line change: update your base URL to Ramp Router’s endpoint.

常见问题

关于 Ramp Router 的工作原理、适用人群以及如何开始使用的直接答案。

什么是 LLM 路由器？

LLM 路由器是用于访问多个 AI 模型的 API 端点。 您无需一次将您的应用程序连接到一个提供商，而是通过我们的路由器发送请求，路由器可以根据质量、成本和可用性为工作选择正确的模型。

它是如何运作的？

您的请求首先发送至 Ramp Router。 我们将验证请求并帮助您跟踪使用情况、型号、提供商和成本。 在不影响质量的情况下，我们会自动将符合条件的请求路由到更具成本效益的层。

Ramp 为什么要构建 LLM 路由器？

节省您的时间和金钱是 Ramp 存在的全部原因。 AI 代币是增长最快的支出类别，我们希望您使用的每一个代币都物有所值。

你们支持哪些型号？

Ramp Router 支持 OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Gemini 的最新模型以及精选的开源模型，包括 Kimi。 当新模型可用时，我们会定期添加对新模型的支持。

它要多少钱？

Ramp Router 在发布时可免费使用。 您将为您使用的代币支付标价。 为了感谢我们的抢先体验用户，前 500 名受邀者将获得 100 美元的促销积分以开始使用。 须遵守优惠条款。

我需要成为 Ramp 客户吗？

不需要。您不需要 Ramp 卡、公司帐户，甚至是 LLC。 我们正在邀请第一批用户抢先体验。 加入候补名单以申请席位。

使用 Ramp Router 和直接与提供商联系有什么区别？

直接选择通常意味着您自己选择一个供应商、一种型号目录和一种定价结构。 Ramp Router 为您提供跨合格型号的一个端点，并且可以将请求路由到满足质量标准的最低成本选项。 随着新型号的推出、价格的变化和性能的变化，Ramp Router 将自动适应，无需您不断地重新进行集成。

我需要重写我的代码才能使用它吗？

不会。Ramp Router 有一个与 OpenAI 兼容的 API，因此，如果您已经在使用 OpenAI SDK 或另一个与 OpenAI 兼容的框架（基本上是所有这些！），切换应该是一行更改：将基本 URL 更新为 Ramp Router 的端点。

谁应该使用这个？

路由器适合那些想要从人工智能中获得更多收益而又不想为此付出过高代价的人。 无论您是自己测试想法、为团队构建还是在整个企业中管理人工智能，它都可以帮助您以更少的成本完成相同的工作。 我们现在正在邀请一个初始小组。 请求邀请。

如果提供商发生中断或对我进行速率限制，会发生什么情况？

如果某个提供商出现故障或对您进行速率限制，Ramp Router 可以将符合条件的请求路由到另一个可用模型，因此当一个提供商无法为其提供服务时，您的应用程序可以进行回退。
